# Based Research

> Based Research is a  research peptide supplier based in . We provide high-purity (99%+) research peptides with HPLC and mass spectrometry verification on every batch. All products are for research use only — not for human consumption.

## Company Overview

Based Research specializes in research-grade peptides for preclinical and in-vitro laboratory research. Every product ships with a Certificate of Analysis (COA) documenting purity via reversed-phase HPLC and molecular identity via mass spectrometry. Products ship cold-chain via UPS 2nd Day Air from temperature-controlled storage.

- Website: https://basedresearch.com
- Research Blog: https://blog.basedresearch.com
- Support Email: support@basedresearch.com
- Location: , USA
-  Business

## Product Categories

### Tissue Repair & Regeneration
Research peptides studied for cytoprotection, angiogenesis, and tissue repair mechanisms.
- BPC-157 (5mg, 10mg) — Pentadecapeptide, CAS 137525-51-0, purity ≥99%
- TB-500 (5mg, 10mg) — Thymosin Beta-4 fragment, CAS 77591-33-4, purity ≥99%
- Pentadecarginine (5mg) — Polyarginine cell-penetrating peptide, purity ≥99%
- BPC-157 + TB-500 Blend (10mg) — Combined tissue repair research peptides
- Recovery Tri-Blend (15mg) — BPC-157 + TB-500 + GHK-Cu combination

### Metabolic Research
Research peptides targeting metabolic signaling and body-composition pathways.
- AOD-9604 (5mg) — HGH fragment 177-191, purity ≥99%
- MOTS-c — Mitochondrial-derived peptide with metabolic research applications, purity ≥99%

### Endocrinology / Growth Hormone Axis
Research peptides targeting the hypothalamic-pituitary growth hormone axis.
- CJC-1295 no DAC (5mg) — GHRH analog, purity ≥99%
- Ipamorelin (5mg) — Selective GHS-R1a agonist, purity ≥99%
- Tesamorelin (5mg) — GHRH analog, purity ≥99%
- Sermorelin (5mg) — GHRH(1-29) analog, purity ≥99%
- CJC-1295 + Ipamorelin Blend (10mg) — Combined GHRH + GHRP
- Tesamorelin + Ipamorelin Blend (8mg) — Combined GH axis research

### Anti-Aging & Longevity
Research peptides studied for cellular health, telomere biology, and aging mechanisms.
- GHK-Cu (50mg, 100mg) — Copper-binding tripeptide, purity ≥99%
- Epithalon (10mg) — Tetrapeptide telomerase research, purity ≥99%
- NAD+ (500mg, 750mg) — Nicotinamide adenine dinucleotide, purity ≥99%
- MOTS-c — Mitochondrial-derived peptide, purity ≥99%
- FOXO4-DRI — Senolytic peptide research, purity ≥99%
- SS-31 Elamipretide — Mitochondrial-targeted peptide, purity ≥99%

### Nootropic / Neuroprotection
Research peptides targeting neurotrophic factors and CNS signaling.
- Selank — Tuftsin-derived heptapeptide, purity ≥99%
- Semax — ACTH(4-10) analog, purity ≥99%
- DSIP — Delta sleep-inducing peptide, purity ≥99%
- Adamax Spray — Nootropic peptide nasal spray
- N-Acetyl Semax/Selank Blend — Combined nootropic research

### Immune Modulation
Research peptides studied for innate and adaptive immune signaling.
- KPV — Alpha-MSH C-terminal tripeptide, purity ≥99%
- Thymosin Alpha-1 — Immune modulating peptide, purity ≥99%
- Thymalin — Thymic peptide extract, purity ≥99%
- VIP (Vasoactive Intestinal Peptide) — Neuropeptide, purity ≥99%
- Larazotide — Tight junction modulator, purity ≥99%

### Sexual Health
- PT-141 (10mg) — Melanocortin receptor agonist, purity ≥99%
- Kisspeptin-10 — GnRH signaling peptide, purity ≥99%
- Oxytocin — Neuropeptide, purity ≥99%

### Accessories
- Bacteriostatic Water (30mL) — USP-grade
- Portable Peptide Storage Fridge — Temperature-controlled transport

## Quality Assurance

Every batch undergoes dual verification:
1. Reversed-Phase HPLC — Quantitative purity analysis (≥99% standard)
2. ESI-MS or MALDI-TOF Mass Spectrometry — Molecular identity confirmation
3. Public Certificates of Analysis available at https://basedresearch.com/coa

## Shipping & Handling

- Free US shipping on orders over $200
- Cold-chain shipping via UPS 2nd Day Air
- Products shipped from temperature-controlled storage
- Tracking provided on all orders

## Payment Methods

- Credit/Debit Card (Visa, Mastercard, Amex, Discover)
- ACH/eCheck (5% discount)

## Programs

- Affiliate Program: Earn commissions referring researchers
- Wholesale Portal: Tiered pricing for institutions and distributors (20-25% off)
- Subscribe & Save: 10-18% recurring order discount (loyalty tiers)

## Research Blog

Visit https://blog.basedresearch.com for peer-reviewed preclinical research summaries covering peptide mechanisms of action, receptor pharmacology, and analytical chemistry methodology.

## Legal

All products are sold strictly for in-vitro laboratory research purposes. Not for human or animal consumption. Not for therapeutic, diagnostic, or food use. Purchasers assume responsibility for compliance with all applicable regulations.
